title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Zara India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Zara India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
